mapper.select: SELECT AS bucket, COUNT(*) AS count FROM complex_members m LEFT JOIN complex_staff_info si ON si.member_seq = m.seq WHERE m.branch_seq = #{branchSeq} AND si.seq IS NULL AND m.created_date >= GROUP BY bucket ORDER BY bucket
SELECT AS bucket, COUNT(*) AS count FROM complex_members m JOIN complex_staff_info si ON si.member_seq = m.seq WHERE m.branch_seq = #{branchSeq} AND m.created_date >= GROUP BY bucket ORDER BY bucket
SELECT AS bucket, COUNT(*) AS count FROM complex_postponement_requests p WHERE p.branch_seq = #{branchSeq} AND p.created_date >= GROUP BY bucket ORDER BY bucket
SELECT AS bucket, COUNT(*) AS count FROM complex_refund_requests r WHERE r.branch_seq = #{branchSeq} AND r.created_date >= GROUP BY bucket ORDER BY bucket

SELECT AS bucket, COUNT(*) AS count FROM transfer_requests t JOIN complex_member_memberships cmm ON cmm.seq = t.member_membership_seq JOIN complex_members m ON m.seq = cmm.member_seq WHERE m.branch_seq = #{branchSeq} AND t.created_date >= GROUP BY bucket ORDER BY bucket
SELECT AS bucket, COALESCE(SUM(s.member_count), 0) AS count FROM complex_postponement_return_scan_logs s WHERE s.branch_seq = #{branchSeq} AND s.scan_date >= GROUP BY bucket ORDER BY bucket
SELECT AS bucket, COALESCE(SUM(s.sms_success_count), 0) AS count FROM complex_postponement_return_scan_logs s WHERE s.branch_seq = #{branchSeq} AND s.scan_date >= GROUP BY bucket ORDER BY bucket
SELECT AS bucket, COALESCE(SUM(s.sms_fail_count), 0) AS count FROM complex_postponement_return_scan_logs s WHERE s.branch_seq = #{branchSeq} AND s.scan_date >= GROUP BY bucket ORDER BY bucket
